name: Shoujo
description: A girl from the wholesaler family. She is a big fan of Nami, says she is her "hope".

name: Silvia Lautreamont
nativeName: シルヴィア・ロートレアモン
description: She is the 4th princess of Lautreamont Knight Country, though, she is a top student and a member of the nobility, she is much known for being cold and arrogant towards everyone. She has a winged white dragon whom she named " Lancelot."
searchTerms: シルヴィア・ロートレアモン

name: Souta Kishibe
description: Souta Kishibe is a childhood friend of Koyuki's. He moved away from her school and became invested in playing soccer. He shares her love of Magical Girls and secretly wanted to be one. One day, his wish was granted and was transformed into La Pucelle. His magical ability is to alter the mass and size of his sword at will. ~!He is the third magical to die after being severely beaten by Cranberry and pushed in front of an oncoming car.!~

name: Suirou
description: __Species:__ Tengu Yokai One of the tengu living on Kurama Mountain. He is much loved within his clan for his kind heart and sweet, loving nature. When young Kurama was being abused by Jirou, Suirou protected and cared for the younger tengu, taking on the role of a beloved older brother.

name: Tatsuji Chibiki
description: Librarian in charge of the No. 2 library room. ~!He was the teacher for class 3-3 the "first year", the year Misaki Yomiyama died. Some years later, he resigned the teaching and stayed as the master of the library. Since then he kept a record of the phenomena, the deceases and their connections, and shares his findings with Kōichi and Mei.!~

name: Tiana
mediaTitles: Ningen Fushin: Adventurers Who Don’t Believe in Humanity Will Save the World

name: Tomomichi Motoyama
description: He is in class 2-7 and is in the Karate Club. Tomomichi is is an extremely loyal friend to Takao and often acts as something of a "wingman" for him. He is an otaku.

name: Utsuho Reiuji
description: Utsuho Reiuji is one of Satori's pets. A Hell raven who has lived in the underground world since before it was separated from Hell. Her job is to regulate the flames of the Hell of Blazing Fires.
mediaTitles: Touhou Sangetsusei: Visionary Fairies in Shrine

name: Vivio Takamachi
description: (StrikerS), 10 (ViVid) __Eye color:__ Green & Brownish red __Hair color:__ Golden Blond __Handedness:__ Right __Intelligent Device:__ Sacred Heart aka Cris After being found by Caro and Erio during their break, she was taken into Nanoha and Fate's care. Her most visible feature is heterochromia. Quattro has referred to her as the "Vessel of the Saints". Also has Nanoha as her mother and Fate as her step-mother who is really her Godmother.

name: Wakamo Kosaka
description: Academy: Allied Hyakkiyako Academy Year: Suspended Club: None Height: 5'3" Hobbies: Destroying, looting Wakamo is a suspended student from Hyakkiyako Alliance Academy and one of the "Seven Prisoners" who escaped from the Federal Corrections Bureau. She is known as the "Fox of Calamity" for her indiscriminate and massive acts of destruction, and her motives and purpose behind them being a mystery. She can also be considered as a terrorist mastermind in this case. She is also rumored to be as scar

name: Youko Imari
description: Youko is a university student majoring in mineralogy. She works closely with [Nagi](https://anilist.co/character/345368)

name: Yue Ayase
description: __Seat Number:__ 4 Yue is Nodoka's best friend, and is often seen around both her and Haruna. She's short and at times has a blunt way of speaking to people, but is generally a friendly person. She likes to read but (ironically) doesn't like to study, and is one of the Baka Rangers (a name for the 5 worst students in Negi's class). When she finds out that Negi is a mage she gets excited about learning magic herself. At first she shows no romantic interest in Negi, but as time goes by she finds h

name: Yuuki Yamada
description: Yuki Yamada is a secondary character in Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu. He is the husband of [Sanae Yamada](https://anilist.co/character/306752) and the father of secondary protagonist [Anna Yamada](https://anilist.co/character/174190/Anna-Yamada) who is a quiet but somewhat doting father that enjoys cooking and video games.

name: Zofia
description: __Height__: 142 cm __Position__: Warrior Candidate Zofia is an Eldian Warrior candidate working for the Marley government. ~!She is a candidate to inherit the Armored Titan power.!~

name: Ahri
description: Innately connected to the latent power of Runeterra, Ahri is a vastaya who can reshape magic into orbs of raw energy. She revels in toying with her prey by manipulating their emotions before devouring their life essence. Despite her predatory nature, Ahri retains a sense of empathy as she receives flashes of memory from each soul she consumes.

name: Akira Kenjou
description: Akira is one of the six main characters of KiraKira☆Pretty Cure A La Mode who is a second year high school student. She is gentle and has a strong sense of justice like a "dog." Akira's alter ego is Cure Chocolat and she is based off chocolates and dogs.
mediaTitles: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories

name: Alver Crossman
description: Alver Crossman is the Crown Prince of the Rowoon Kingdom and the eldest son of Zed Crossman.

name: Aoi
description: __Race:__ Elf __Height:__ 158 cm Aoi is a very shy girl who has trouble making friends, though she has the determination to try and 'overcome trials/hurdles'. One day she meets [Yuuki](https://anilist.co/character/160249/Yuuki) and together they form the 'BB Brigade' in order to make new friends. She is a member of the guild 'Forestier', and she likes mentally preparing to make friends. (Source: Princess Connect! Re:Dive Wiki)

name: Arash
description: He is the Archer-class Servant of Elsa Saijou in the First Holy Grail War of Fate/Prototype: Fragments of Sky Silver. Archer's True Name is Arash, a legendary great hero from the Ancient Persia. He brought an end to the 60-year war between the Persians and Turkish while serving under King Manuchehr, who was known as the last king of the age of gods in west Asia. This hero is the savior who brought peace and order to both these peoples.
